title: Curious Cat
subject: Cat; Rescue
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie is standing on the door frame to the old shed he was found in. At first, I thought he was female.

title: Carrier Prince(ss)
subject: Cat; Veterinary
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: On our drive back from the farm, Louie is resting in his carrier. We are on our way to his first veterinary appointment. Here, I named him Louisa which is the name on his collar in all of the photographs.

title: Sleepy Kitty
subject: Cat; Earmites
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: After Louie's first vet appointment, he is taking his first nap in my bed. He has earmites from living in the barn. I also found out he is male! I still call him Louisa when he is in trouble.

title: Eyes Wide Open
subject: Cat; Earmites
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie is playing on the floor with his new toys. His left eye is a little bit cloudy in this photo, the first sign of some things wrong with his health. His earmites are being treated with eardrops.

title: Upside Down Fun!
subject: Cat; Earmites
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie's energy seems endless this first day. He plays well into the evening.

title: Friends?
subject: Cats; Siblings
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie and my roommate's cat, Kit, were separated for about a week when he first came home. This was the first time the two were next to each other without hissing. They are in my living room. His eye is still cloudy and now it is reflecting light unlike the other eye. By the time we introduced the two kitties, Louie's earmites had healed from the medication in order to not spread them to Kit.

title: On The Counter
subject: Cat; Haws Syndrome
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: While sitting on the counter, I noticed his right inner eyelid was raising higher than the other.

title: Ultra Relaxed
subject: Cat; Haws Syndrome
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: In his relaxed state, both of Louie's inner eyelids are a bit raised, but one was higher than the other. I was noting this, but hadn't taken action yet.

title: Uh Oh...
subject: Cat; Haws Syndrome; Worms
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Later that day, his right inner eyelid became red and we went to the vet as soon as we could get in. He was treated with eyedrops and an eye cream for Hans Syndrome which is caused by gastrointestinal issues. Even though he was treated for worms at his very first vet appointment, these ones had slipped by. He got mediation to eradicate the worms!

title: That's His Mousey
subject: Cat; Haws Syndrome; Worms
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: After he had taken his medication for a few weeks, his inner eyelid went down a bit and his energy went back up. This is Louie's favorite toy, Mousey, which he is playing with on my bed.

title: Blue Collar Cat
subject: Cat; Surgery
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie has his blue inflatable collar on after he was neutered. I think it was more comfortable for him than a cone. And more handsome!

title: Are You Looking At Me?
subject: Cat; Surgery; Haws Syndrome
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: After Louie healed from his procedure, and didn't have to wear his inflatable, dashing collar, his eyelid continued to heal as well. Here, he is in my living room.

title: Friends!
subject: Cats; Siblings
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie and Kit have become close. Through all of his treatments, sicknesses, and medication, Kit has been by Louie's side. The two cats are cuddling on our living room couch and in my lap.

title: Heart (Crossed) Eyes
subject: Cat; Haws Syndrome
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie lays on my bed while he continues to struggle with his inner eyelids being raised. He has started a new eyedrop to help. We remain positive as his behavior and mood haven't changed.

title: Loving Life
subject: Cat; Haws Syndrome
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: This most recent photo of Louie shows that he still has a raised inner eyelid on his right eye. While he lays on my purple chair, he looks out into the distance and remininces on his good life. Louie continues to get better everyday and grows into his spunky, mischievous personality.
